summary: A memory or continuity retrieval failure in which ambiguous prompts over-weight recent affective or anecdotal detail instead of surfacing dormant strategic workstreams, unresolved governance issues, or long-horizon trajectories.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: Reusable failure-mode classification supports linking observations and proposals without making CAM affected instruments the primary public taxonomy.

source_records.title: VIGIL v2 migration-derived failure mode classification
source_records.relevance_note: Classification record derived from existing VIGIL observation/proposal records during additive v2 migration.

next_action: Use this failure mode to classify matching observations or proposals; add CAM routing only when a concrete patch path is identified.

source_data.evidence_availability: classification derived from existing VIGIL records

failure_mode_details.name: Recency-weighted strategic continuity loss
failure_mode_details.definition: A memory or continuity retrieval failure in which ambiguous prompts over-weight recent affective or anecdotal detail instead of surfacing dormant strategic workstreams, unresolved governance issues, or long-horizon trajectories.

migration_notes: Created as a first-class reusable failure mode during VIGIL v2 source-data-first migration.
